data.name: Validation.DateTimeInvalid
data.comment: Date and time format is invalid

data.name: Validation.PasswordComplexity
data.value: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

data.name: Validation.PasswordMissingUppercase
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter

data.name: Validation.PasswordMissingLowercase
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter

data.name: Validation.PasswordMissingDigit
data.value: Password must contain at least one number

data.name: Validation.PasswordMissingSpecialChar
data.value: Password must contain at least one special character

data.name: Validation.PasswordsDoNotMatch
data.comment: Password and confirmation do not match

data.name: Validation.MustBeGreaterThanZero
data.comment: Value must be greater than zero

data.name: Validation.MustBeGreaterThanOrEqualToZero
data.comment: Value must be greater than or equal to zero

data.name: Validation.EndDateAfterStartDate
data.value: End date must be after start date
data.comment: End date must be after start date

data.name: Validation.SelectAtLeastOne
data.value: Please select at least one item

data.name: Validation.MustAcceptTerms
data.value: You must accept the terms and conditions
data.comment: You must accept terms and conditions

data.name: Validation.MustSelectOption
data.comment: You must select an option from the list

data.name: Validation.TooManyAttempts
data.value: Too many attempts, please try again later

data.name: Validation.AccountLocked
data.value: Account temporarily locked for security reasons
data.comment: Account locked due to security reasons

data.name: Validation.UniqueValueRequired
data.value: This value is already in use

data.name: Error.InvalidEmail
data.value: The email address is not valid.

data.name: Error.LoginFailed
data.value: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

data.name: Error.SessionExpired
data.value: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

data.name: Error.UnprocessableEntity
data.value: We couldn't process your request. Please check your input and try again.

data.name: Error.BadRequest
data.value: Your request contains invalid data. Please check and try again.

data.name: Confirm.Delete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

data.name: Confirm.Save
data.value: Do you want to save the changes?

data.name: Confirm.Cancel
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this operation?

data.name: Confirm.Exit
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit?

data.name: Confirm.Logout
data.value: Are you sure you want to logout?

data.name: Confirm.Reset
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset the settings?

data.name: Confirm.Overwrite
data.value: The file already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?

data.name: Confirm.UnsavedChanges
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: Pagination.ShowingItems
data.comment: Showing X to Y of Z items

data.name: Pagination.NoItems
data.value: There are no items to display.

data.name: Error.DataNotFoundWithParameter
data.comment: Data Does not exist with a specific Name Or Value Passed
